message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant "LoginPartialView" as LoginPartialView
participant "MicrosoftIdentityLibrary\n(ASP.NET Core Identity)" as MicrosoftIdentityLibrary
database StudieTipsDB

User ->> LoginPartialView : clicks on "Register"\n(sends action)
activate LoginPartialView
LoginPartialView --> MicrosoftIdentityLibrary : Creates RegisterView\nto display registration form
deactivate LoginPartialView

loop While user not registered [While user not registered]
    note over User,StudieTipsDB #LightBlue:user inputs e-mail,\npassword and password confirmation
    
    alt E-mail is invalid [E-mail is invalid]
        activate MicrosoftIdentityLibrary
        return Display 'The Email field is not a valid e-mail address'.
        deactivate MicrosoftIdentityLibrary
        
    else Password length check failed [Password is less than 6 or greater than 100 characters]
        activate MicrosoftIdentityLibrary
        return Display 'The password must be at least 6 and at max 100 chracters long.'
        deactivate MicrosoftIdentityLibrary
        
    else Confirmation mismatch detected [Password and confirmation password do not match]
        activate MicrosoftIdentityLibrary
        return Display 'The password and confirmation password do not match'
        deactivate MicrosoftIdentityLibrary
    end
    
    User ->> MicrosoftIdentityLibrary : User clicks register button
    activate MicrosoftIdentityLibrary
    
    alt Symbol requirement unmet [Password does not contain at least one symbol]
        return Display 'Passwords must have at least one non alphanumeric character'.
        
    else Digit missing in input [Passord does not contain at least digit]
        return Display 'Passwords must have at least one digit ('0'-'9').'
        
    else No uppercase letters found [Password does not contain uppercase letters]
        return Display 'Passwords must have at least one uppercase ('A'-'Z').'
        
    else Insufficient unique chars used [Password does not contain 4 different charachters]
        return Display 'Passwords must use at least 4 diffrent charchers.'
    
    else Duplicate email attempt made [E-mail is already in use]
        return Display 'Username \'E-mail\' is already taken.'
    end
    
    create participant HomeController
    MicrosoftIdentityLibrary -> StudiumsTipserContext : Create new ApplicationUser object from provided data
    StudiumsTipserContext -> StudyInfoDbManager : SaveChangesAsync() to persist account creation request into DBMS system tables like AspNetUsers table etc.. 
    destroy StudiumsTipserContext 
    
end loop 

note right of Homecontroller#footer:"Create home view after successful login process completion."  
@enduml
